subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One calleth unto the people of the Covenant and summoneth them unto the Most Exalted Horizon, O peoples of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مظلوم آفاق اهل میثاق را ندا مینماید و بافق اعلی دعوت میفرماید حزبهای عالم
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @high station of the true believer, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
